tier.label: Highly Fundable
tier.summary: The profile shows stronger readiness signals and may be appropriate for a prompt funding-strategy review, subject to documentation and human review.

primary_funding_family.label: Working Capital Review
primary_funding_family.summary: A general working-capital path may fit short-cycle needs such as payroll, inventory, materials, or expansion.

secondary_funding_families.label: Business Line of Credit Review
secondary_funding_families.summary: A revolving capital path may be worth reviewing where revenue, bank activity, and documentation support it.

risks: Requested amount should be confirmed against recent revenue and bank activity.
strengths: Business bank activity available for review
Business structure is moving in the right direction

recommended_documents.label: Recent business bank statements
recommended_documents.detail: Prepare the most recent three to six complete statements for human review.

recommended_documents.label: Current profit and loss statement
recommended_documents.detail: A current year-to-date statement may help confirm operating performance.

recommended_documents.label: Entity and EIN documentation
recommended_documents.detail: Prepare formation documents and EIN confirmation where requested.

next_steps.label: Send the preparation checklist to the applicant.
Review the readiness result and supporting documents before any external submission.
